title: Statement coverage is 67.4%, not full
evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.674; defect_rate=1.0 (build+tests pass). Uncovered paths include DB-error branches in handlers.go:55,71,91 and the 500 fallbacks.
suggestion: Add tests for the error/500 branches if higher coverage is desired; behavior itself is covered.

title: Inconsistent success response envelope across routes
evidence: handlers.go:59 POST returns wrapped {message,book} (SuccessResponse); handlers.go:97 GET and handlers.go:79 LIST return the raw Book/[]Book; handlers.go:153 DELETE returns {message}.
suggestion: Pick one envelope convention for all mutating/reading routes for API consistency.

title: Unused test helper ptrInt
evidence: integration_test.go:336 func ptrInt is defined but never called (ptrString is used at line 273).

title: Dead-code helper joinStrings duplicates strings.Join
evidence: database.go:204 joinStrings reimplements the stdlib strings.Join used at database.go:161.
suggestion: Use strings.Join and drop the hand-rolled helper.
